scenes.title: The Flower Garden
scenes.background_prompt: A neat garden with a row of flower beds, a stone path, a wooden trellis with climbing roses, a green watering can on the path, and a white picket fence. Sunny day. No flowers in the main bed, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A neat garden on a sunny day. Four identical bright red tulips stand in a row along the edge of a flower bed, each with a straight green stem and two smooth leaves, evenly spaced about a foot apart. The leftmost tulip leans slightly toward the sun, the second stands perfectly upright, the third has a dewdrop visible on one petal, and the fourth tilts gently to the right. A yellow butterfly with black-edged wings hovers above the tulips, moving between them. A green metal watering can sits on the stone path in front of the flower bed. Behind the tulips, a wooden trellis supports climbing pink roses. A white picket fence encloses the garden, and the sky is a clear blue.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place tulip_1 at the left edge of the flower bed, leaning slightly toward the sun. Place tulip_2 next to it, standing perfectly upright. Place tulip_3 next, with a dewdrop on one petal. Place tulip_4 at the right, tilting gently right. Place butterfly hovering above the tulips, moving between them. Place watering_can on the stone path in front of the bed.
scenes.scene_description: In the immediate foreground of this children's picture-book scene, a lush green lawn is scattered with small, four-petaled white flowers and green clovers. A horizontal stone path made of flat, irregular brown stones separates the lawn from the garden area. Moving from left to right in the middle ground, there is a rectangular raised garden bed constructed from dark brown wood. Inside this bed, three red tulips grow from the soil: tulip_1 is on the left, tulip_2 is in the center with a small white droplet on its petal, and tulip_3 is on the right. A yellow butterfly with black wing markings flutters in the air above tulip_1. To the right of this garden bed is a tall, dark brown wooden trellis covered in dense green vines with small leaves and buds. At the base of the trellis, to its right, sits a green watering_can. Further to the right are three additional rectangular raised wooden garden beds, all filled with dark brown soil but currently empty of plants. Behind the garden beds and trellis, a white picket fence with pointed tops spans the width of the image. In the background, rolling green hills and rounded green trees sit under a clear blue sky dotted with several fluffy white clouds. On the far right, a large, full green tree with a thick brown trunk stands behind the fence. The scene is illuminated by bright, even daylight.

CH: yellow butterfly with black wing markings

white picket fence behind the garden
raised wooden beds filled with soil
clear blue sky with fluffy clouds

watering can sitting ready for use

gardener intending to plant more seeds
A: butterfly flying over the garden bed
vines growing up the wooden trellis

empty beds waiting for new plants

tall trellis covered in green vines
